value.en: Managed Care: €95/month, plus €80 per turnover support (arrival & departure coordination)
value.pt: Gestao Assistida: EUR95/mes + EUR80 por suporte de turnover (coordenacao de chegadas e saidas)

value.en: Revenue & Hosting: €95/month + 25% of gross rental revenue
value.pt: Revenue & Hosting: EUR95/mes + 25% da receita bruta
